scripts.db:migrate:local: cd apps/server && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply luminatick-db --local
scripts.db:seed:local: npx tsx apps/server/src/scripts/seed.ts --file apps/server/seed.sql && cd apps/server && npx wrangler d1 execute luminatick-db --local --file=seed.sql && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('seed.sql')) fs.unlinkSync('seed.sql')"
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:server && npm run deploy:env && npm run deploy:dashboard && npm run deploy:portal && npm run deploy:widget
scripts.deploy:server: cd apps/server && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply luminatick-db --remote && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:dashboard: npm run build --workspace=apps/dashboard && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/dashboard/dist --project-name=luminatick-dashboard
scripts.deploy:portal: npm run build --workspace=apps/portal && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/portal/dist --project-name=luminatick-portal
scripts.deploy:widget: npm run build --workspace=apps/widget && npx wrangler r2 object put luminatick-widget/lumina-widget.js --file apps/widget/dist/lumina-widget.js
scripts.seed:prod: npx tsx apps/server/src/scripts/seed.ts --file apps/server/seed.sql && cd apps/server && npx wrangler d1 execute luminatick-db --remote --file=seed.sql && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('seed.sql')) fs.unlinkSync('seed.sql')"
